requirements.title: Interview before build
requirements.description: AO Blueprint must collect enough user intent before downstream AO work starts.
requirements.acceptance: A session can start, ask the next question, record answers, and report status.

requirements.title: Readiness gate
requirements.description: AO Blueprint must compute deterministic 100 point readiness.
requirements.acceptance: The valid fixture audits to score 100 and status ready.

requirements.title: Authorization gate
requirements.description: AO Blueprint must block downstream builds without approval, score 100, and clean safety results.
requirements.acceptance: The invalid fixture exits non-zero and writes blocked authorization.
